segments.beat: Overhead flat-lay of device on textured surface; active display showing pixel game graphics (Snake-like), full device visible
Continued flat-lay, display cycles through game screens; transparent shell clearly visible from above
Hand enters frame, picks up device; transition from flat-lay to held-in-hand perspective
Device held in one hand, portrait orientation; transparent shell and internal PCB fully visible through clear resin, display active
Hand rotates device slowly; PCB internals, ribbon cable, components visible through shell walls and back; display on
Device tilted to show side and back faces; component-level transparency demonstrated — chips, solder points, battery connector visible
Returns to front-facing hold; display showing game title/splash, D-pad and A/B buttons clearly framed
Device brought closer to camera; display legibility + shell clarity close-up; USB-C port glimpsed on bottom edge
Camera zooms into bare PCB and display module from rear; ribbon cable and board traces fill frame — extreme internals close-up
Final frames: wide display close-up with text/graphics on screen, device still in hand, fade to hold

demonstrates.motion_value: high — sustained slow rotation exposes PCB, chips, ribbon cable, solder through clear shell
high — display actively rendering game graphics from flat-lay open-air angle makes see-through quality unambiguous
medium — hand-pickup moment gives instant size reference, device fits comfortably in single hand
medium — Snake-style game running continuously on display throughout most of clip
medium — slow rotation treat-it-like-an-object handling implies display/collectible intent
medium — extreme PCB close-up exposes raw components, traces, ribbon cable — signals openness/hackability
medium — resin shell clarity and clean component layout visible during rotation
low — device alone on surface, no unboxing or accessories shown

selection_note: ~59s SILENT product montage (flat-lay -> hand pickup -> slow 360 rotation -> PCB extreme close-up); covers transparency, scale, gaming, hackability in sequence. Long for a hero loop but no narration needed; use as an extended feature/demo reel or cut into shorter loops.

aesthetics.standout: scrolling demo shows live app variety
aesthetics.weakness: handheld prototype on carpet/table - reads as a bench test, not a product
aesthetics.note: full 59s is a raw demo reel: flat-lay then handheld PCB-exposed shots, camera drifts/tilts, messy desk in macro third - nothing cut-ready without a reshoot
